# Service Section

> A showcase of distinctive service-section design themes across different industries — healthcare, fitness, agency, and roofing — built as reusable layout references.

## Pages

- [Healthcare](/): Comprehensive care services with a scroll-driven stack layout.
- [Fitness](/fitness): Fitness studio services theme.
- [Agency](/agency): Creative agency services theme.
- [Roofing](/roofing): Roofing company services theme.
